header.headline: Come to Derry, NH
header.description: By appointment only. Monday afternoons. No walk-ins accepted.

hours.heading: Hours & Availability
hours.note: All visits by appointment only. Book through the online system.

whatToBring.heading: What to Bring to Your Appointment
items: Your completed documents (do not sign in advance)
Exact cash or a check for the service fee
Any supporting documents referenced in your booking notes

form.heading: Have a Question Before Booking?
form.subheading: Not ready to book an appointment yet? Send a message and Sylvia will respond within one business day.

fields.name: Your Name
fields.subject: Subject
fields.messagePlaceholder: Tell us briefly what you need help with…

form.successBody: Thank you — Sylvia will be in touch within one business day. If your matter is urgent, please book an appointment directly.
form.errorBody: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
